headline: General Motors Revives Chevy Bolt EV And Reframes EV Profit Potential
summary: General Motors (NYSE:GM) is bringing back the Chevy Bolt EV, targeting improved efficiency and a better profitability profile. The company plans to reuse existing manufacturing resources and focus on cost reductions to support the relaunched model. The move signals GM's continued commitment to electric vehicles beyond its higher profile performance offerings. For investors watching NYSE:GM at a share price of $74.69, the Bolt decision arrives after a 1 year return of 56.9% and a 3 year gain...
